9300 E Orchard Rd, Greenwood Village, CO 80111, USA

Located at Silo Park between the barn and road. It appears these are not watered often but there is still a good amount for fruit on two large bushes. Sweet and delicious right off the bush, and made a great cobbler. Access: Public.
